mapper.select: SELECT id, agent_id, message_id, message_json, cleaned, create_time FROM chat_memory WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT id, agent_id, message_id, message_json, cleaned, create_time FROM chat_memory WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} AND cleaned = #{cleaned} ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_memory (agent_id, message_id, message_json, cleaned, create_time) VALUES (#{agentId}, #{messageId}, #{messageJson}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chat_memory WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} AND message_id = #{messageId}
